testcase.name: App helper functions > loads role and name from localStorage without restoring session code
testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App.helpers.test.jsx:6:25

testcase.name: App helper functions > falls back to defaults on malformed preferences
testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App.helpers.test.jsx:6:25

testcase.name: App helper functions > postJson sends JSON body and returns parsed result
testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App.helpers.test.jsx:6:25

testcase.name: App helper functions > postJson throws on non-ok responses
testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App.helpers.test.jsx:6:25

testcase.name: App helper functions > apiRequest supports auth, form data and 204 responses
testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App.helpers.test.jsx:6:25

testcase.name: App helper functions > renders known icon and ignores unknown one
testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App.helpers.test.jsx:6:25

testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App.test.jsx:7:25

testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App2.test.jsx:7:25

testcase.name: App Massive Coverage 2 > renders Student Flow and handles joining
testcase.failure: TypeError: window.localStorage.clear is not a function ❯ src/App2.test.jsx:7:25

testcase.name: config > exposes apiBase and wsBase strings
config > uses explicit API base when VITE_API_BASE is provided
CountdownBanner > renders nothing when break is inactive
CountdownBanner > shows countdown and return time for active break
QuizOverlay > returns null when quiz is missing
QuizOverlay > calls onAnswer when clicking an option
QuizOverlay > locks answers when readonly or already selected
SessionQRCode > renders nothing without value
SessionQRCode > renders generated qr image on success
SessionQRCode > stays hidden when generation fails
StatCard > renders label, value and optional help text
StatCard > hides help block when help is missing
App helper functions > loads role and name from localStorage without restoring session code
App helper functions > falls back to defaults on malformed preferences
App helper functions > postJson sends JSON body and returns parsed result
App helper functions > postJson throws on non-ok responses
App helper functions > apiRequest supports auth, form data and 204 responses
App helper functions > renders known icon and ignores unknown one
App Massive Coverage > renders auth and toggles
App Massive Coverage > login fail
App Massive Coverage > login success
App Massive Coverage > register success
App Massive Coverage > logs out and clears localStorage
App Massive Coverage 2 > renders Teacher Dashboard and handles session creation
App Massive Coverage 2 > renders Student Flow and handles joining
config > exposes apiBase and wsBase strings
config > uses explicit API base when VITE_API_BASE is provided
CountdownBanner > renders nothing when break is inactive
CountdownBanner > shows countdown and return time for active break
QuizOverlay > returns null when quiz is missing
QuizOverlay > calls onAnswer when clicking an option
QuizOverlay > locks answers when readonly or already selected
SessionQRCode > renders nothing without value
SessionQRCode > renders generated qr image on success
SessionQRCode > stays hidden when generation fails
StatCard > renders label, value and optional help text
StatCard > hides help block when help is missing
